title: esula salicetorum
intro: Esula salicetorum, also known as the willow-leaved esula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Esula salicetorum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions and wounds, and promoting digestion. Esula salicetorum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
